ddls:
CREATE TABLE "detectors" (
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detector */,
  "detector_name" TEXT /* Name of the detector */,
  "detector_type" TEXT /* Type of the detector */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the detector */,
  "detector_model" TEXT /* Model number of the detector */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the detector was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the detector */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detector_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detector the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readouts" (
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readout */,
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detector the readout belongs to */,
  "readout_time" TEXT /* Time of the readout */,
  "readout_data" TEXT /* Data from the readout */,
  "readout_status" TEXT /* Status of the readout */,
  "readout_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the readout process in seconds */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Error code if the readout failed */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the readout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readouts_detector_id FOREIGN KEY ("detector_id") REFERENCES detectors ("detector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payloads" (
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payload */,
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readout the payload belongs to */,
  "payload_data" TEXT /* Data from the payload */,
  "payload_type" TEXT /* Type of the payload */,
  "payload_size" INTEGER /* Size of the payload in bytes */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum value for data integrity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payload was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payloads_readout_id FOREIGN KEY ("readout_id") REFERENCES readouts ("readout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hits" (
  "hit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hit */,
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readout the hit belongs to */,
  "hit_time" TEXT /* Time of the hit */,
  "hit_data" TEXT /* Data from the hit */,
  "hit_amplitude" REAL /* Amplitude of the hit */,
  "hit_energy" REAL /* Energy of the hit */,
  "hit_position_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the hit position */,
  "hit_position_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the hit position */,
  "hit_position_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the hit position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hits_readout_id FOREIGN KEY ("readout_id") REFERENCES readouts ("readout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tot_msbs" (
  "tot_msb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tot msb value */,
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readout the tot msb value belongs to */,
  "tot_msb_value" INTEGER /* Value of the tot msb */,
  "readout_status" TEXT /* Status of the readout associated with the tot msb value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tot msb value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tot_msb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tot_msbs_readout_id FOREIGN KEY ("readout_id") REFERENCES readouts ("readout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tot_lsbs" (
  "tot_lsb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tot lsb value */,
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readout the tot lsb value belongs to */,
  "tot_lsb_value" INTEGER /* Value of the tot lsb */,
  "readout_status" TEXT /* Status of the readout associated with the tot lsb value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tot lsb value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tot_lsb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tot_lsbs_readout_id FOREIGN KEY ("readout_id") REFERENCES readouts ("readout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tot_totals" (
  "tot_total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tot total value */,
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readout the tot total value belongs to */,
  "tot_total_value" INTEGER /* Value of the tot total */,
  "readout_status" TEXT /* Status of the readout associated with the tot total value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tot total value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tot_total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tot_totals_readout_id FOREIGN KEY ("readout_id") REFERENCES readouts ("readout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tot_us" (
  "tot_us_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tot us value */,
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readout the tot us value belongs to */,
  "tot_us_value" REAL /* Value of the tot us */,
  "readout_status" TEXT /* Status of the readout associated with the tot us value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tot us value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tot_us_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tot_us_readout_id FOREIGN KEY ("readout_id") REFERENCES readouts ("readout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hittimes" (
  "hittime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hittime */,
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readout the hittime belongs to */,
  "hittime_value" REAL /* Value of the hittime */,
  "readout_status" TEXT /* Status of the readout associated with the hittime value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the hittime value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hittime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hittimes_readout_id FOREIGN KEY ("readout_id") REFERENCES readouts ("readout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dec_orders" (
  "dec_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dec order */,
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readout the dec order belongs to */,
  "dec_order_value" INTEGER /* Value of the dec order */,
  "readout_status" TEXT /* Status of the readout associated with the dec order value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dec order value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dec_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dec_orders_readout_id FOREIGN KEY ("readout_id") REFERENCES readouts ("readout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isCols" (
  "isCol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isCol value */,
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readout the isCol value belongs to */,
  "isCol_value" INTEGER /* Value of the isCol */,
  "readout_status" TEXT /* Status of the readout associated with the isCol value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the isCol value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isCol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_isCols_readout_id FOREIGN KEY ("readout_id") REFERENCES readouts ("readout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chip_ids" (
  "chip_id_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chip ID */,
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readout the chip ID belongs to */,
  "chip_id_value" INTEGER /* Value of the chip ID */,
  "readout_status" TEXT /* Status of the readout associated with the chip ID value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chip ID value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chip_id_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chip_ids_readout_id FOREIGN KEY ("readout_id") REFERENCES readouts ("readout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readout the location belongs to */,
  "location_value" INTEGER /* Value of the location */,
  "readout_status" TEXT /* Status of the readout associated with the location value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_readout_id FOREIGN KEY ("readout_id") REFERENCES readouts ("readout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timestamps" (
  "timestamp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestamp */,
  "readout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readout the timestamp belongs to */,
  "timestamp_value" INTEGER /* Value of the timestamp */,
  "readout_status" TEXT /* Status of the readout associated with the timestamp value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the timestamp value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timestamps_readout_id FOREIGN KEY ("readout_id") REFERENCES readouts ("readout_id")
)
